title: Zillow Group Third Quarter 2024 Earnings: Beats Expectations
text: Zillow Group Q3 2024 Earnings Analysis. Financial Performance: Zillow Group exceeded market expectations in its third quarter 2024 results. Revenue: $581.0 million, representing 17% year-over-year growth. Net Loss: $20.0 million, with the loss narrowing by 29% compared to Q3 2023. EPS: Loss of $0.086 per share, an improvement from the $0.12 loss reported in the prior year. Market Expectations vs. Results: The company delivered stronger-than-expected results: "Revenue exceeded analyst estimates by 4.7%. Earnings per share (EPS) also surpassed analyst estimates by 51%." This significant EPS beat demonstrates operational improvement and cost management effectiveness. Growth Outlook: Looking forward, the company projects revenue growth of 12% annually over the next three years, outpacing the Real Estate industry's forecasted 11% average growth rate. Market Reaction: The positive earnings surprise resonated with investors, with the company's shares gaining 25% over the week following the announcement, indicating strong market confidence in Zillow's trajectory.
